ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geographic location (GEO_ID) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location (e.g., Anderson County, Texas) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name (e.g., Texas) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County name (e.g., Anderson County) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name (e.g., Palestine) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code (e.g., 75801) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the geographic location where the data was collected */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., B01003_001E) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, observation) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES dataset_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the estimate belongs to */,
  "estimate_value" INTEGER /* Value of the estimate */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation for the estimate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "margins_of_error" (
  "margin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each margin of error */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the margin of error belongs to */,
  "margin_value" INTEGER /* Value of the margin of error */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation for the margin of error */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the margin of error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("margin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_margins_of_error_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_margins_of_error_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation (e.g., None, *****) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the annotation (e.g., *, ***) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., population estimates, margins of error) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
